body_transformation: The wings now shimmer with electric blue feathers interwoven with vibrant yellow circuit patterns that glow faintly, while the curled tail tip is tipped with sparking neon green fur that crackles with static. The once-beige body now has a lean, wiry frame with a matte black base color accented by jagged lightning-bolt spines along the spine. Pointed ears are enhanced with sharp angular edges and glow with neon green circuitry at the tips, and the short stubby legs are covered in sleek electric blue scales with subtle yellow sparkles. The compact bird-like silhouette remains intact, with only the texture and material of each part shifting to electric-themed elements.
signature_feature: Tail tip: neon green sparking fur with crackling static discharges.
